ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL( Skill__c ,'SFDC') && ISBLANK(TEXT(Certification__c ))|| ISPICKVAL( Skill__c ,'JAVA') && ISBLANK(TEXT(Certification__c ))|| ISPICKVAL( Skill__c ,'CLOUD') && ISBLANK(TEXT(Certification__c))|| ISPICKVAL( Skill__c ,'Testing') && ISBLANK(TEXT(Certification__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Certification is required for selected skill.
